saas_applications.title: ResumeIQ — AI Resume Tracker
saas_applications.description: A full-stack AI resume tracker with job matching, AI-generated cover letters, an ATS gap scanner, a payment gateway, and an admin panel.

saas_applications.title: BillFlow — Invoice & Billing SaaS
saas_applications.description: A complete multi-tenant invoice builder with workspace switching, role-based access control (RBAC), automatic PDF generation, and Stripe subscription checkouts.

saas_applications.title: BugFlow — In-App Bug Reporting SaaS
saas_applications.description: A developer-first B2B bug tracker. Includes an embeddable JS widget for canvas annotations, console logs capturing, network details, and real-time triage dashboards.

featured_projects.title: Smart AI Bulb Socket
featured_projects.description: An IoT-based smart bulb socket built for automation and energy efficiency, with AI-driven usage patterns that auto-schedule lighting and cut energy consumption by ~20%.

featured_projects.title: Shieldfied — Cybersecurity Platform
featured_projects.description: A cybersecurity web app with a cyberpunk-themed, glassmorphism UI and threat-simulation features built to teach everyday users better digital hygiene.

featured_projects.title: BattleOP — Esports Platform
featured_projects.description: A full-stack esports platform for tournament participation, with wallet management, Razorpay payments, real-time updates and an admin dashboard.

featured_projects.title: EcoStock — Smart Inventory System
featured_projects.description: A smart inventory management platform with barcode scanning, live stock tracking, dashboard analytics and sensor-monitoring support.

featured_projects.title: Campus ERP System
featured_projects.description: A centralized academic management platform for students, faculty and admins — covering role-based auth, announcements, marks transparency and academic requests.
